title: G9 LED Bulbs Cool White 3.5W, 6500K, 400LM, Non-Flickering, Equivalent G9 Halogen Light Bulbs 40W, Non-Dimmable, Pack of 6
features: [Energy Saving] - Those G9 LED bulbs replace 40W halogen bulbs, reducing electricity consumption by 90% and offering the same brightness.
[Eye Protection] - With no harmful radiation, Those G9 bulbs provide a clear, flicker-free light and high color rendering (CRI>85).
[Long Lifespan] - High-quality chips in these LED bulbs ensure a lifespan of up to 15,000 hours, reducing frequent bulb replacements.
[Easy Installation] - Standard G9 bi-pin base allows for quick installation in all G9 light fixtures, offering instant brightness.
[Wide Application] - Suitable for a range of interior lighting needs, from chandeliers and desk lamps to wall sconces and ceiling fans.
description: Product Description SPECIFICATION G9 LED Bulbs 3.5W Cool White The G9 LED Bulbs feature a base of G9 and operate at 3.5W with a voltage of AC 220-240V at 50Hz. Emitting 400 lumens, they offer a cool white at 6000K color temperature with a CRI of 85. These bulbs are non-dimmable and have a lifespan of 20,000 hours.
